case_fact_summary.summary: Specter Industries has issued a Cease and Desist Notice to Zane Global Corp regarding the use of the trademark 'Specter'. The notice demands the cessation of trademark use within 30 days and claims $2,000,000 in damages. Any legal disputes are to be resolved via binding arbitration under New York law.
key_facts: The Cease and Desist Notice was entered into by Specter Industries and Zane Global Corp [SOURCE: cease_desist_notice.pdf, Page 1].
A total of $2,000,000 in damages is claimed [SOURCE: cease_desist_notice.pdf, Page 1].
The agreement is governed by the laws of the State of New York [SOURCE: cease_desist_notice.pdf, Page 1].
Disputes arising from this agreement shall be resolved through binding arbitration [SOURCE: cease_desist_notice.pdf, Page 1].
obligations: Zane Global Corp is ordered to cease all use of the trademark 'Specter' within 30 days [SOURCE: cease_desist_notice.pdf, Page 1].
timeline: January 3, 2025: Issuance of the Cease and Desist Notice [SOURCE: cease_desist_notice.pdf, Page 1].
By February 2, 2025 (within 30 days): Deadline to cease all use of the trademark 'Specter' [SOURCE: cease_desist_notice.pdf, Page 1].
